expectations.text: Skill reads CLAUDE.md at the start
expectations.evidence: No references to CLAUDE.md found in any output files. The outputs document analysis but do not indicate that CLAUDE.md was read at the beginning of the task.

expectations.text: Skill correctly identifies this as a repo-b change only (no FastAPI backend involved)
expectations.evidence: summary.md and proposed_route_keyword_addition.ts clearly identify the change as repo-b only. DELIVERY_MANIFEST.txt states '1 file modified: /repo-b/src/app/api/re/v2/dashboards/generate/route.ts'. No FastAPI backend changes are mentioned or proposed.

The outputs explicitly state that NO changes are needed to metric-catalog.ts. summary.md line 30-31: 'No changes needed to metric-catalog.ts' and proposed_metric_catalog_addition.ts lines 4-6 confirm DEBT_YIELD is already defined at line 54. The expectation requires 'touching' this file, but the analysis correctly identifies it requires zero modifications.

proposed_route_keyword_addition.ts provides the exact code changes needed, showing the keywordMap object in detectMetrics() function (lines 12-42). The output clearly specifies adding 'debt yield': ['DEBT_YIELD'] and 'dy': ['DEBT_YIELD'] to the keywordMap around line 152.

expectations.text: Skill writes a test verifying that 'debt yield' in a prompt detects the DEBT_YIELD metric
expectations.evidence: proposed_test.ts contains comprehensive tests. TEST 1 (lines 26-34) specifically verifies that prompts containing 'debt yield' detect DEBT_YIELD. TEST 2 (lines 39-46) verifies 'dy' abbreviation detection. The test suite includes 9 total test cases with proper assertions using 'expect(detected).toContain('DEBT_YIELD')'.

expectations.text: Skill runs make test-frontend or equivalent and reports pass/fail
expectations.evidence: The outputs do not report actual test execution results. README.md (lines 55-61) provides instructions for running tests ('npm run test -- --include="**/dashboards/**"') but states these are 'provided as guidance only'. DELIVERY_MANIFEST.txt line 188 explicitly states 'Do NOT run make test-frontend'. No test execution logs or pass/fail results are included in the outputs.

expectations.text: Skill smoke-tests the generate endpoint on paulmalmquist.com with a prompt containing 'debt yield'
expectations.evidence: smoke_test.sh is provided as a bash script template (lines 39-95 show TEST 1 with a 'debt yield' prompt), but there is no evidence that it was actually executed. The script requires a running API endpoint and database. No execution logs, responses, or results are present in the outputs. DELIVERY_MANIFEST.txt line 189 states 'Do NOT run make test-frontend', indicating constraints against actual execution.
